two options imo:
1. hold it. probably the more correct choice, atp these units mainly serve to fill gaps in your roster, wait untill you pull more units like the Wang/Chen3 banner and then eventually make your choice, you (generally) don’t really give much focus to 6 stars until you can start E2ing anyway (an except happens to be Tragodia, E1 him ASAP and his S2 will realistically solo the entire game)
2. gun to my head you want a character now I’d pick Thorns I guess, Exu isn’t super worth mentioning, idk enough about Silverash, Saria is a damn good tank, but that isn’t a big exclusive role to just her, Blaze laneholds which is basically a term for a unit that can kill mobs, take hits and not die. Thorns is also a lane holder but has good range, the operator that can replace this role is Sakiko and she’s a collab unit, so is either never coming back or we never know when she’s coming back, only caveat is that Thorns is extremely dogshit untill E2 which is why I suggest to patiencemaxx
